semantic_examples: The user is opening the conversation or greeting the assistant
The user wants to understand services or fit
The user is asking about cost or a quote
The user asks how long the work will take
The user wants proof or examples of previous work
The user wants a human consultant or meeting
The user asks about confidentiality or an NDA

The user raises an objection or complaint
